calendar.description: Senate Government Operations and Political Subdivisions Hearing
House Economic Development and Workforce Services Hearing

general_provisions: This bill creates the State-Endorsed Digital Identity Program.
hilighted_provisions: This bill:<hr><ltbullet>defines terms;<hr><ltbullet>establishes a digital identity bill of rights; <hr><ltbullet>creates the State-Endorsed Digital Identity Program within the Department of Government Operations;<hr><ltbullet>establishes requirements for state-endorsed digital identities; <hr><ltbullet>adds a state-endorsed digital identity as an acceptable form of proof of age;<hr><ltbullet>establishes application and eligibility requirements for obtaining a state-endorsed digital identity; <hr><ltbullet>establishes identity proofing standards; <hr><ltbullet>establishes requirements for governmental entities, health care providers, digital wallet providers, verifiers, and relying parties; <hr><ltbullet>creates a duty of loyalty related to processing identity attributes;<hr><ltbullet>provides for complaint and enforcement procedures;<hr><ltbullet>provides for a one-time audit by the Office of the Legislative Auditor General;<hr><ltbullet>provides for coordination with state agencies on use cases for the state-endorsed digital identity program;<hr><ltbullet>provides for severability;<hr><ltbullet>provides for the repeal of the electronic license certificate or identification card upon sunset review; and <hr><ltbullet>makes technical and conforming changes.
